_comment: Tunables for the Engineering Design Support System. Defaults are first-pass guesses for a months-long single-engineer project (spec section 10 + hypothesis open questions). Each is documented in documentation.md as adjustable. Never hardcode these in skill prose - read them from here.

relevance._note: weights sum to 1.0; divergenceThreshold flags asserted-vs-derived gaps (REQ-8)

focus._note: focusTau in days (exp decay constant); Sum(focus) is conserved == focusBudget within tolerance

synthesis._note: a KG cluster unchanged this many days is eligible for wiki synthesis (REQ-10,11)

hypothesis._note: evidenceWeight in 0..1 (signed by direction); stall window = lerp(stallWindowMinDays, stallWindowBaseDays) scaled inversely by relevance; perHypothesisOverrides keyed by hypothesis node id

report._note: loadBearingRelevance: Decision relevance at/above which it counts as load-bearing

curator._note: patient: ageOutStaleDays marks (does not delete); post-step caps bound token budget
